queries.question: Show all the animated films, also show the comedies, but just those released in 2021.
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.title 
FROM FilmGenres JOIN Films ON FilmGenres.film_id = Films.id
WHERE FilmGenres.genre = "Animation" OR FilmGenres.genre = "Comedy" AND Films.release_year = 2021
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?filmgenres a :Film_Genre .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?filmgenres p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?filmgenres p:genre ?genre_w .
  ?filmgenres p:genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?films p:release_year ?release_year_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Animation" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Comedy" && (STR(?release_year_w) = "2021" || STR(?release_year_w) = "2021.0"))))
}

queries.question: Show films released in 2021 that are either animations or comedies.
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.title 
FROM FilmGenres JOIN Films ON FilmGenres.film_id = Films.id
WHERE (FilmGenres.genre = "Animation" OR FilmGenres.genre = "Comedy") AND Films.release_year = 2021
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?filmgenres a :Film_Genre .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?filmgenres p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?filmgenres p:genre ?genre_w .
  ?filmgenres p:genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?films p:release_year ?release_year_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Animation" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Comedy")) && (STR(?release_year_w) = "2021" || STR(?release_year_w) = "2021.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all animations and comedies released in 2021.
